_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: treatment with VS-4718 did not significantly reduce DRG volume...revealed a significant decrease in the percentage of abnormal tissue and a significant increase in the percentage of neuron cell bodies
details: Treatment did not significantly reduce DRG volume but resulted in significant decrease in abnormal tissue percentage and increase in neuron cell bodies
